overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt of Rivia walking through a vibrant, modded natural landscape. The character traverses a wildflower meadow, follows a dirt path, explores a turquoise riverbank, and returns to the forested area under bright summer sunlight.

scene_state.functional_zone: wildflower meadow with scattered oak trees

agents.ego_description: Geralt walking steadily through tall grass and colorful wildflowers toward a distant dirt path

entered.detail: lush green grass with mixed wildflowers covering the ground
tall purple lupine flowers scattered throughout the meadow
bright red poppy flowers visible in the grass
mature oak trees with full green canopies
winding dirt trail visible in the distance

segments.scene_description: Geralt walks through a vibrant summer meadow filled with tall grass, purple lupines, and red poppies. The camera follows from behind as he approaches a dirt path winding through scattered oak trees under a bright blue sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: forest dirt path descending toward river

events.description: transition from wildflower meadow onto defined dirt path

agents.ego_description: Geralt walking along the dirt path, descending slightly toward the river visible in the distance

entered.detail: weathered wooden fence posts lining the right side of the path
turquoise river water visible through the trees ahead

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions to a defined dirt trail as Geralt leaves the deep meadow grass behind. He descends along the path flanked by oak trees and wooden fence posts, with glimpses of turquoise river water becoming visible through the foliage ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: grassy riverbank approach with dense vegetation

events.description: leaves the dirt path and veers right through tall grass toward the river

agents.ego_description: Geralt leaving the path to explore the riverbank, walking through tall grass and bushes

entered.detail: sandy shoreline becoming visible at the water's edge
drooping willow trees lining the riverbank

segments.scene_description: Geralt leaves the dirt path and descends through dense vegetation toward the river. The camera follows him through tall grass and past willow trees as the sandy riverbank and turquoise water come into clearer view.

scene_state.functional_zone: sandy riverbank with clear turquoise water

events.description: reaches the sandy beach at the water's edge
pauses at the water's edge to look around, then continues walking along the shore

agents.ego_description: Geralt walking along the sandy shore, stopping briefly to observe the river before continuing

entered.detail: dense forest lining the opposite bank of the river
large fallen tree trunk resting on the beach

segments.scene_description: Geralt emerges onto a sandy beach at the river's edge, the clear turquoise water lapping at the shore. He pauses briefly to survey the forested opposite bank, then walks along the beach past a fallen log, with the camera capturing the vibrant colors of the water and sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: grassy slope leading away from river

events.description: turns away from the river and walks back up the grassy slope

agents.ego_description: Geralt turning away from the river and ascending the grassy bank back toward the trees

entered.detail: massive oak tree with spreading branches
wooden fence line running along the slope

segments.scene_description: Geralt turns away from the river and ascends a grassy slope, passing a large oak tree and wooden fence. The river recedes into the background as he moves back into the vegetated area, with purple wildflowers reappearing in the grass.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a vibrant wildflower meadow down to a turquoise riverbank and back into the lush greenery. It begins with Geralt walking through tall grass filled with purple lupines and red poppies before he transitions onto a winding dirt trail flanked by oak trees and wooden fence posts. As he leaves the path, the camera follows him through dense vegetation and willow trees, where the foliage gradually opens up to reveal a sandy beach and clear turquoise water. The scene then expands as he walks along the river's edge past a fallen log, surveying the forested opposite bank under a bright blue sky. Finally, the camera tracks him as he turns away from the shore and ascends a grassy slope, passing a large oak tree as the river recedes and purple wildflowers reappear in the landscape.
